title: The Final Goatman
description: The Final Goatman adds a terrifying cryptid to Minecraft 1.20.1. Featuring custom sounds, animations, and AI, the Goatman stalks players through forests and dark areas, creating tense and unpredictable encounters.
body: The Final Goatman adds a new hostile cryptid to Minecraft 1.20.1. If you've ever wanted a creature that feels like it's actually hunting you instead of just running straight at you, this mod is for you. The Goatman wanders forests and other dark areas, stalking players from a distance before attacking. It comes with custom sounds, animations, and behavior designed to make encounters feel unpredictable. The mod includes a completely custom Goatman with its own model, animations, sounds, and AI. It spawns naturally in the world and is fully compatible with multiplayer on Forge 1.20.1. The Goatman isn't meant to be another regular hostile mob. Sometimes you'll hear it before you see it. Sometimes you'll see it before it sees you. Either way, staying out at night is a lot less safe.
